case_title: CHRISTIAN ROBSAHM VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY ROBSAHM, CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY YVONNE QUINTANA-PROPERTY MANAGER,JACKY LOPEZ-LEGAL DEPT. MGR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBSAHM, CHRISTIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
